data.body:
Sometimes the phone is not ruining sleep with blue light.

It is ruining sleep by being a tiny slot machine on the nightstand.

A buzz, a glow, one quick time check after a brief awakening, and now the brain has a reason to stay up. If you wake tired a lot, make the bedroom less interesting.
